title: El and L's Dyes
description: Adds 20 new dyes to the game, bringing the total number of dyes to 36! These are integrated into your world with unique crops, deco, plantlife, and more!
body:
El & L's Dye Mod







El and L’s Dye Mod not only adds 20 new dyes to your Minecraft world, but also content that integrates with the new dyes as well. Including new crops, foods, flowers, mushrooms, and useful items! We also have a keen interest in making our dye mod as compatable as possible with other mods.

Current Features

- 20 new dyes, which have all base vanilla dye functions - New dyable decoration blocks, such as Corrugated Iron and a dyable stone named Mucktuff - Mint - a new crop and food item found in Meadows and Birch Forests - Artichokes - a new crop and food item found in Savannas and Sparse Jungles - Lavender - a flower which can be used to make Soap and Flowering Melons, which can speed up or stop the growth of baby animals - Wintergreen Trees - a new tree in cold climates with a new wood type and berries - Peach Trees - a new tree which grows Peaches and is found in Sparse Jungles - Pineapples - a new melon-like crop and food source found on Beaches - Waxcap Mushrooms - which can be bonemealed for an alternative to beeswax, and are found in old-growth taiga and spruce forests. - Strawberries - found in large patches in treeless biomes, and have plenty of new foods you can make with them. - Cherries - A berry that can now drop from cherry blossom trees. - New Sniffer plants and Archeology loot - Ember Arrows - a glowing arorow flare be used to permanantly light up places from far away and light up the ceilings of caves from a distance. - Madder Root - a new plant that has a new woodset growing just under the surface! - Cinnibar - A dangerous type of rock, used to make Gas Bombs. - Cochineal Beetles - A bug found on Cacti rarely, particularly in the Badlands biome. - Plenty of new flowers and plants, including Cordylines, Thistles, Periwinkles, and Hypericum flowers.
We will try to add many more plants, foods, and even new mobs in the future! You can see upcoming content on our Discord server.

Installation

This mod requires Fabric, Fabric API, Fabric Language Kotlin, and Geckolib.
This mod is untested with Synatra Connector, and using the two in conjunction is not supported.
If you are having trouble launching the mod, or if you have any other issues or conflicts to report, submit an issue or let us know on our Discord server and we'd be happy to take a look!

Mods with Feature Integration

Current: - Supplementaries - Create - Create Deco - Biome Makeover - Amendments - Snowy Spirit - Sleep Tight - Botany Pots - Comforts - Nature's Spirit (Thanks to Eka) - Bountiful Fares (Thanks to Hecco) - Cooking for Blockheads - Excessive Building - Wallpapers - Arts & Crafts (You will need to download Arts & Crafts Compatibility)
Planned For the Future: - Twigs - Furnish - Another Furniture - Hearth & Home - Urban Decor - Squashed!

Notes for developers

Our mod ID and common tag is: "mint", rather than something like "elandls" because we did not plan ahead after adding more dyes after mint and by that point is was too late to change the mod ID. You know how it is. ^u^ Our primary goal is compatibility. If your mod is having trouble with ours feel free to [submit an issue](https://github.com/Tellios-Projects/Mint/issues) or contact us on [our discord](https://discord.gg/4dpWsGbvMQ) and we'll see how we can help.

Credits
